title: Volunteer Coordination Platform
persona: Local volunteer organizations coordinating shifts and events
narrative: An organizer posts volunteer opportunities, volunteers sign up for shifts, check in on site, and track their impact over time.

activities.title: Post opportunities
activities.description: I create volunteer shifts and events that people can sign up for

activities.title: Volunteers sign up
activities.description: Volunteers browse and claim shifts that fit their schedule

activities.title: Check in on site
activities.description: Volunteers confirm they showed up and log their hours

activities.title: Track impact
activities.description: Volunteers and organizers see cumulative hours and outcomes

activities.title: Grow community
activities.description: Organizers recruit and retain volunteers through recognition

releases.label: MVP
releases.goal: An organizer can post a shift and a volunteer can claim it — the core matching loop works.

releases.label: On-site check-in
releases.goal: Organizers know who actually showed up — hours are logged automatically, not on paper.

releases.label: Impact dashboard
releases.goal: Volunteers see their cumulative impact and organizers can report to funders with real data.

releases.label: Retention
releases.goal: Volunteers keep coming back — recognition, reminders, and community features reduce churn.

stories.title: Export report as PDF for funders
